question: How many customers are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers

question: List all product names and their prices
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY name

question: What are the names of all categories?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM categories ORDER BY name

question: Which customers are from New York?
gold_sql: SELECT name, email FROM customers WHERE city = 'New York'

question: What is the total number of orders?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders

question: List all completed orders with their total amount
gold_sql: SELECT id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY id

question: What are the top 3 most expensive products?
gold_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3

question: How many orders does each customer have?
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: What is the average order total?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders

question: Which products are in the Electronics category?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, p.price FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics'

question: List orders that are either pending or processing
gold_sql: SELECT id, customer_id, status, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing') ORDER BY id

question: What is the total revenue from completed orders?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

question: Which product has the highest stock quantity?
gold_sql: SELECT name, stock_quantity FROM products ORDER BY stock_quantity DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many products are in each category?
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY product_count DESC

question: Show the order items for order number 1
gold_sql: SELECT oi.id, p.name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = 1

question: What is the total quantity sold for each product?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_sold DESC

question: Which customers have never placed an order?
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, c.email FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.id IS NULL

question: What is the most popular product by units sold?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY units DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all customers and their total spend on completed orders
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_spend FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY total_spend DESC

question: How many orders are in each status?
gold_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
